title: Bolivia Races to Destroy Millions in Cash That Fell From Sky
description: Bolivian authorities are scrambling to destroy the equivalent of $62 million worth of local currency bank notes that fell from the sky in a deadly plane crash in the country’s second largest city.
content: Bolivian authorities are scrambling to destroy the equivalent of $62 million worth of local currency bank notes that fell from the sky in a deadly plane crash in the country’s second largest city.
